meaning: n.<缇庡彛>娉曞叞鍏嬬棣欒偁
examples: Lufthansa fly to La Paz from Frankfurt.

You'll see how fine it is in Frankfurt.

European markets slipped, with London, Frankfurt and Paris all closing down by about 2%.
